query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS referral_codes (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  userId INT NOT NULL,
  code VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  clicks INT DEFAULT 0,
  conversions INT DEFAULT 0,
  totalEarnings DECIMAL(12,2) DEFAULT 0.00,
  commissionRate DECIMAL(5,2) DEFAULT 20.00,
  status ENUM('active','paused','banned') DEFAULT 'active',
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS referral_conversions (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  referralCodeId INT NOT NULL,
  referrerId INT NOT NULL,
  convertedUserId INT,
  plan VARCHAR(32),
  amount DECIMAL(12,2),
  commission DECIMAL(12,2),
  status ENUM('pending','approved','paid','rejected') DEFAULT 'pending',
  stripePaymentIntentId VARCHAR(256),
  paidAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS revenue_snapshots (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  snapshotDate DATE NOT NULL,
  mrr DECIMAL(14,2) DEFAULT 0.00,
  arr DECIMAL(14,2) DEFAULT 0.00,
  newMrr DECIMAL(14,2) DEFAULT 0.00,
  churnedMrr DECIMAL(14,2) DEFAULT 0.00,
  expansionMrr DECIMAL(14,2) DEFAULT 0.00,
  activeSubscribers INT DEFAULT 0,
  trialUsers INT DEFAULT 0,
  totalUsers INT DEFAULT 0,
  avgLtv DECIMAL(12,2) DEFAULT 0.00,
  cac DECIMAL(12,2) DEFAULT 0.00,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
